message.content:
@startuml
title dwb critics class map

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

class TrajectoryCritic <<C>>
class MapGridCritic <<C>>
class CostmapQueue <<C>>
class PreferForwardCritic <<C>>
class RotateToGoalCritic <<C>>
class TwirlingCritic <<C>>
class OscillationCritic <<C>>
class BaseObstacleCritic <<C>>

class GoalDistCritic <<C>>
class PathDistCritic <<C>>
class MapGridQueue <<C>>
class CommandTrend <<C>>
class ObstacleFootprintCritic <<C>>
class GoalAlignCritic <<C>>
class PathAlignCritic <<C>>

MapGridCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic
CostmapQueue -|> TrajectoryCritic
PreferForwardCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic
RotateToGoalCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic
TwirlingCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic
OscillationCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic
BaseObstacleCritic -|> TrajectoryCritic

GoalDistCritic -|> MapGridCritic
PathDistCritic -|> MapGridCritic

MapGridQueue -|> CostmapQueue

GoalAlignCritic -|> GoalDistCritic
PathAlignCritic -|> PathDistCritic

CommandTrend o-- OscillationCritic
ObstacleFootprintCritic -|> BaseObstacleCritic

@enduml
